---
title: 'Connect'
date: '2013-11-10T19:32:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4542246887452782977'
blogger_filename: '/2013/11/connect.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<h4 style="text-align: center;">Connect </h4><br />There are several ways to connect with me and they are:<br /><ul><li>Email Me: <a href="mailto:DarrellGWolfe@gmail.com">DarrellGWolfe@gmail.com</a><a href="mailto:N2GoodSuccess@gmail.com" target="_blank"></a></li><li>Twitter: <a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe</a></li><li>Facebook: <a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a> </li></ul><h4 style="text-align: center;">Other Work</h4><br />I like to keep busy, so here are other projects I work on when I have time:<br /><ul><li><b>Fiction</b>: I'm trying my hand at Fiction and posting those on their own space.&nbsp;</li><ul><li><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://authorfun.blogspot.com</a></li></ul><li><b>Reviews </b>of dining and activities in Fort Worth Texas</li><ul><li><a href="http://texaslivinginfo.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://texaslivinginfo.blogspot.com/</a></li></ul><li><b>Crafts and More</b>, by my wife Flavia</li><ul><li><a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/" target="_blank">www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a></li></ul></ul><div style="text-align: center;"><h4><b>My Online Journals</b></h4></div><div style="text-align: center;"><b><br /></b></div><div>These are essentially my electronic journals for storing information. I find it easier to write an entry into a blog than keep up with paper journals I'll loose and never read.&nbsp;</div><div><ul><li><b>&nbsp;Bible Study Blog</b></li><ul><li><a href="http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/</a></li></ul><li><b>Audio - Music - Worship Notes</b></li><ul><li><a href="http://towdahaudio.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://towdahaudio.blogspot.com</a></li></ul></ul><div><br /></div></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div>
